cases.mutation: Resets to 0.30 V but never changes gain_ctrl after reset.
Uses the right threshold, reset value, step size, and clamps but applies the feedback direction backwards.
Implements the correct direction and clamp range but uses 0.04 V steps instead of 0.05 V.
Updates correctly after reset but resets gain_ctrl to 0.35 V instead of 0.30 V.
Responds to any nonzero meas-target error, so it drifts inside the required +/-0.02 V deadband.
Implements reset, direction, step size, and upper clamp but allows gain_ctrl below 0.05 V.
